```vibecompass-decision-recommendation target=decisions/cross-cutting.md
**Title:** First repeated local decision
**Decision:** First repeated recommendation should append independently.
**Rationale:** Repeated target blocks are accepted as separate decisions.
```

```vibecompass-decision-recommendation target=decisions/cross-cutting.md
**Title:** Second repeated local decision
**Decision:** Second repeated recommendation should append independently.
**Rationale:** The target file can receive multiple accepted recommendations in one apply.
```
